metadata.description: Cross-check Claude's answers with Gemini + isolated Opus subagent before bothering you. Three review styles, auto-picked by what you type. CLI-only.

plugins.name: dont-ask-me
plugins.description: Stop being the bottleneck. Your AI cross-checks itself with Gemini (different model family) and an isolated Opus subagent (same family, no parent context) before answering. Three review styles auto-picked by what you type: Devil's Advocate (single critique), Boardroom Debate (parallel dual-validation, the headline pattern), Round-Table Discussion (3-round Claude × Gemini brainstorm for multi-option convergence). Two-model setup: 3.5 Flash primary, 3.1 Pro fallback. CLI-only, no MCP. Merges previous skill-gemini + skill-brainstorm into one.
